languages.text: Легенды о том, как влады{mf|ка|чица} фон Валанциус броси{mf|л|ла} вызов древнему неописуемому злу, выйдя победителем из схватки с ним, еще долго гуляли по всему Простору Коронус, передаваясь из уст в уста и обрастая все более невероятными подробностями. Наследие рода фон Валанциус было восстановлено, и власть его укрепилась стократ. Истина же, сохраняемая в строжайшей тайне, заключалась в том, что много лет спустя Неисчислимый вновь вернулся в Простор, и на сей раз с одной-единственной целью — заполучить легендарного Вольного Торговца в свое полное и безраздельное владение. Итог этого противостояния неизвестен, а последние упоминания о нем затерялись в пучине времени.

The legends of how {mf|Lord|Lady} von Valancius challenged an ancient, indescribable evil and vanquished it in battle spread throughout the Koronus Expanse long after, passing from mouth to mouth and gaining more incredible details with each telling. The legacy of House von Valancius was restored, and its power was strengthened a hundredfold. The truth, however, was that many years later, Trazyn the Infinite returned to the Expanse, this time with the sole purpose of claiming the legendary Rogue Trader as his complete and undisputed possession. The outcome of that confrontation is unknown, and the latest mentions of it have been lost to time's abyss.

languages.text: ヴァランシウス家の伝説は、古く、形容しがたい邪悪な存在に挑み、その邪悪な存在を戦いで打ち破ったというものでした。この伝説は、コーロナス・エクスパンションに広まり、口から口へと伝えられていくにつれて、さらに信じられないような詳細が加えられました。ヴァランシウス家の遺産は復活し、その力は百倍に強まりました。しかし、その真実は、何年も後に、トラズィン・ザ・インフィニットがエクスパンションに戻ってきたことでした。そして、その目的は、伝説のローグ・トレーダーを完全に、そして疑いのない所有物にすることでした。その対決の結果は不明であり、その最新の情報は時間の深淵に失われました。
languages.original_text: The legends of how {mf|Lord|Lady} von Valancius challenged an ancient, indescribable evil and vanquished it in battle spread throughout the Koronus Expanse long after, passing from mouth to mouth and gaining more incredible details with each telling. The legacy of House von Valancius was restored, and its power was strengthened a hundredfold. The truth, however, was that many years later, Trazyn the Infinite returned to the Expanse, this time with the sole purpose of claiming the legendary Rogue Trader as his complete and undisputed possession. The outcome of that confrontation is unknown, and the latest mentions of it have been lost to time's abyss.

languages.text: 有一个传说在科罗努斯扩区流传了很久，据说，冯·瓦兰修斯大人曾挑战一个不可名状的远古之恶，并在战斗中将它打了个落花流水。人们口口相传，每一次讲述都会平添更多惊人的细节。冯·瓦兰修斯家族的传承得以恢复，势力更比从前强了百倍。但实际上，多年后无限者特拉金重返扩区，而他只有一个目的：将这位传奇行商浪人彻底据为己有，使其成为他无可争议的私人藏品。那场对决的结果已无从知晓，关于它的最后记载也已消失在时间的深渊里。
languages.original_text: The legends of how {mf|Lord|Lady} von Valancius challenged an ancient, indescribable evil and vanquished it in battle spread throughout the Koronus Expanse long after, passing from mouth to mouth and gaining more incredible details with each telling. The legacy of House von Valancius was restored, and its power was strengthened a hundredfold. The truth, however, was that many years later, Trazyn the Infinite returned to the Expanse, this time with the sole purpose of claiming the legendary Rogue Trader as his complete and undisputed possession. The outcome of that confrontation is unknown, and the latest mentions of it have been lost to time's abyss.

languages.text: La victoire remportée par {mf|le seigneur|la dame} von Valancius contre un mal ancien et innommable devint une légende qui se répandit et perdura dans les Étendues de Koronus pendant bien longtemps. Transmise de bouche à oreille, elle gagnait toujours plus de détails rocambolesques chaque fois qu'on la racontait. L'héritage de la maison von Valancius fut restauré et son pouvoir s'en trouva renforcé au centuple. En vérité, cependant, Trazyn l'Infini revint dans les Étendues bien des années plus tard, avec cette fois pour unique but de capturer {mf|le légendaire libre-marchand|la légendaire libre-marchande} pour en faire sa possession incontestée. L'issue de cet affrontement est inconnue et les derniers textes le mentionnant se sont perdus dans les limbes du temps.
languages.original_text: The legends of how {mf|Lord|Lady} von Valancius challenged an ancient, indescribable evil and vanquished it in battle spread throughout the Koronus Expanse long after, passing from mouth to mouth and gaining more incredible details with each telling. The legacy of House von Valancius was restored, and its power was strengthened a hundredfold. The truth, however, was that many years later, Trazyn the Infinite returned to the Expanse, this time with the sole purpose of claiming the legendary Rogue Trader as his complete and undisputed possession. The outcome of that confrontation is unknown, and the latest mentions of it have been lost to time's abyss.

languages.text: Las leyendas sobre cómo {mf|el señor|la señora} von Valancius desafió a un mal ancestral e indescriptible y lo derrotó en combate se propagaron por la Extensión de Koronus durante mucho tiempo, adquiriendo nuevos detalles increíbles con cada narración. El legado de la casa von Valancius se restauró y su poder se multiplicó hasta límites insospechados. La verdad, sin embargo, fue que, muchos años después, Trazyn el Infinito regresó a la Extensión, esta vez con el único propósito de hacerse con {mf|el|la} legendari{mf|o|a} Comerciante Independiente como posesión indiscutible. El resultado de aquel enfrentamiento se desconoce, y sus últimas menciones se han perdido en el abismo del tiempo.
languages.original_text: The legends of how {mf|Lord|Lady} von Valancius challenged an ancient, indescribable evil and vanquished it in battle spread throughout the Koronus Expanse long after, passing from mouth to mouth and gaining more incredible details with each telling. The legacy of House von Valancius was restored, and its power was strengthened a hundredfold. The truth, however, was that many years later, Trazyn the Infinite returned to the Expanse, this time with the sole purpose of claiming the legendary Rogue Trader as his complete and undisputed possession. The outcome of that confrontation is unknown, and the latest mentions of it have been lost to time's abyss.

traits.locale_text: Las leyendas sobre cómo {mf|el señor|la señora} von Valancius desafió a un mal ancestral e indescriptible y lo derrotó en combate se propagaron por la Extensión de Koronus durante mucho tiempo, adquiriendo nuevos detalles increíbles con cada narración. El legado de la casa von Valancius se restauró y su poder se multiplicó hasta límites insospechados. La verdad, sin embargo, fue que, muchos años después, Trazyn el Infinito regresó a la Extensión, esta vez con el único propósito de hacerse con {mflel|la} legendari{mf|o|a} Comerciante Independiente como posesión indiscutible. El resultado de aquel enfrentamiento se desconoce, y sus últimas menciones se han perdido en el abismo del tiempo.

languages.text: {mf|Lord|Leydi} von Valancius'un kadim, tarifsiz bir kötülüğe meydan okuyuşuna ve onu savaşta yenişine dair efsaneler; uzun süre sonra Koronus Enginliği'nin dört bir yanına yayıldı, dilden dile dolaştı ve her anlatımda daha inanılmaz ayrıntılar kazandı. Von Valancius Hanesi'nin mirası kurtarıldı, gücü yüz kat arttı. Ancak yıllar sonra Mutlak Trazyn, Enginlik'e geri döndü. Bu sefer tek amacı, efsanevi Hür Tacir'i kendisinin mutlak ve tartışılmaz malı ilan etmekti. Bu çatışmanın sonucu bilinmiyor ve bu hususa dair son söylemler, zamanın dipsizliğinde kaybolup gitmiş durumda.
languages.original_text: The legends of how {mf|Lord|Lady} von Valancius challenged an ancient, indescribable evil and vanquished it in battle spread throughout the Koronus Expanse long after, passing from mouth to mouth and gaining more incredible details with each telling. The legacy of House von Valancius was restored, and its power was strengthened a hundredfold. The truth, however, was that many years later, Trazyn the Infinite returned to the Expanse, this time with the sole purpose of claiming the legendary Rogue Trader as his complete and undisputed possession. languages.text: Die Legenden, wie {mf|Lord|Lady} von Valancius ein uraltes, unbeschreiblich böses Wesen im Kampf vernichtete, wurde in der Koronus-Ausdehnung lange weitererzählt und mit immer unglaublicheren Details ausgeschmückt. Das Vermächtnis von Haus von Valancius war wiederhergestellt und seine Macht hundertfach gefestigt. Allerdings kehrte Trazyn der Unendliche viele Jahre später mit dem einzigen Ziel in die Ausdehnung zurück, {mf|den legendären Freihändler|die legendäre Freihändlerin} vollständig und unangefochten in seinen Besitz zu bringen. Das Ergebnis dieser Konfrontation ist unbekannt, und seine jüngsten Erwähnungen gingen in den Abgründen der Zeit verloren.
